title: Delhivery Ventures Solutions is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Delhivery Ventures Solutions is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled E-commerce Executive looking for your next big career move? Delhivery Ventures Solutions in Allahabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Delhivery Ventures Solutions:
Delhivery Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Delhivery Ventures Solutions!
